Package io.cloudstub.lambda

Class CloudStubLambdaService

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.lambda.CloudStubLambdaService
All Implemented Interfaces:
CloudStubService
public class CloudStubLambdaService extends Object implements CloudStubService
CloudStub service module for AWS Lambda.

Lambda uses the REST JSON protocol (not the X-Amz-Target JSON protocol): AWS SDK v2 drives it with HTTP method + path, e.g. POST /2015-03-31/functions and POST /2015-03-31/functions/{name}/invocations, matched by StubRegistrar.registerRestStub(io.cloudstub.core.spi.HttpMethod, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).

The function lifecycle and tag operations are state-backed: each is a StubHandler that reads and writes the shared StateStore, so a function created by CreateFunction is returned by a later GetFunction and reflected in ListFunctions. State is keyed under the lambda/ prefix (see LambdaKeys):

  • lambda/functions/{name} → the function configuration
  • lambda/tags/{name} → the function's tag set

Invoke does not execute code: it echoes the request payload back as the response body with status 200 and X-Amz-Executed-Version: $LATEST, so callers get a deterministic, inspectable result.

Not simulated: function execution, versions and aliases (a qualifier in the name or ARN is ignored), layers, concurrency, event source mappings, URLs, event-invoke config, and durable executions. CodeSize/CodeSha256 are derived from the inline ZipFile bytes only.

Discovered via ServiceLoader from META-INF/services/io.cloudstub.core.spi.CloudStubService.

  • Method Details

    • serviceId

      public String serviceId()
      Description copied from interface: CloudStubService
      Unique, lowercase identifier for the AWS service this module handles. Used for logging and diagnostic output only — it does not affect routing.
      Specified by:
      serviceId in interface CloudStubService
      Returns:
      service identifier, e.g. "sqs", "secretsmanager", "s3"

    • register

      public void register(CloudStubContext context)
      Description copied from interface: CloudStubService
      Registers all stubs for this service and receives the shared state store. Called exactly once per CloudStub lifecycle, before any test traffic arrives.
      Specified by:
      register in interface CloudStubService
      Parameters:
      context - carries the stub registrar and the shared state store
